nasb.text: Your hands made me and fashioned me; Give me understanding, that I may learn Your commandments.

esv.text: Your hands have made and fashioned me; give me understanding that I may learn your commandments.

cnv.text: 你的手造了我，建立了我； 求你使我有悟性，可以學習你的命令。

ccb.text: 你亲手造我、塑我， 求你赐我悟性好明白你的命令。

csbs.text: 你的手造了我，又坚立我； 求你使我有悟性，好学习你的诫命。
